text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and confirmed across multiple authoritative sources (Science journal, PubMed, FU Berlin publications page). The cited author list (Noé, Olsson, Köhler, Wu) matches the actual author list found on the FU Berlin repository and multiple reference lists (e.g., result 3: "Noé, F. and Olsson, S. and Köhler, J. and Wu, H."), even though the Semantic Scholar automated checker reports only 3 authors. The discrepancy is a metadata mismatch in the checker, not evidence of hallucination.
LINK: https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aaw1147
FOUND_TITLE: Boltzmann generators: Sampling equilibrium states of many-body systems with deep learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Frank Noé, Simon Olsson, Jonas Köhler, Hao Wu
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
